notes: Runs fine with a controller. I've  chosen  OpenGL in the configurator.
title: Bus Driver

notes: Sometimes the configuration screen doesn't come up. But after that it was possible to play the game. You may have to create ~/.local/share/Steam/SteamApps/compatdata/302080/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/My Documents/Bus Driver/config.cfg by your own to make it work. My res of 1920x1080 was not supported by the game. But setting unsupported resolutions like mine caused it to have rendering issues (e.g. disappearing lines for designated stops).
title: Bus Driver
